title: The Missing Star Fruit
shortDescription: When Ube Baby's favorite glowing star fruit goes missing, Pineapple Baby sets out to find it — only to discover that Tiki Trouble has been up to his sneaky tricks again.
lesson: It's okay to ask for help when something feels too big to handle alone.
setting: Starlight Garden and the edge of Trouble Island

scenes.title: A Missing Treasure
scenes.summary: Ube Baby wakes up to find her glowing star fruit is gone. She feels sad and worried. Pineapple Baby notices and immediately offers to help find it.
scenes.visualNotes: Soft morning light in Starlight Garden. Cozy, dreamy atmosphere. Ube Baby's expression shifts from sleepy to sad.

scenes.title: Clues on the Beach
scenes.summary: Pineapple Baby and Ube Baby follow a trail of sparkle dust leading toward Trouble Island. They spot tiny footprints and hear a distant 'Hehehe!'
scenes.visualNotes: Sandy tropical beach. Sparkle trail glimmering in the sand. Coconut trees in the background.

scenes.title: Tiki's Big Mistake
scenes.summary: Tiki Trouble is discovered trying to use the star fruit as a fancy new hat decoration. He insists it belongs to him now. But when Pineapple Baby explains how much it means to Ube Baby, Tiki pauses — and feels a tiny pang of guilt.
scenes.visualNotes: Dramatic Trouble Island scene. Tiki is caught in the act. Exaggerated expressions throughout.

backgroundLayers.promptText: Background layer for a Fruit Baby story panel. Setting: Classroom — indoor school classroom setting during night with elements: lesson, garden, park, dream. Mood: joyful. Style: flat digital illustration, warm color palette, kid-friendly. No characters in this layer — background environment only. Consistent with the Fruit Baby brand aesthetic: tropical warmth, bold colors, clean lines.

characterLayers.promptText:
[CHARACTER LAYER — PINEAPPLE BABY]
Generate an isolated character layer of Pineapple Baby only. This is an admin-only production asset for staged compositing.
Do NOT include any other Fruit Baby characters in this layer.

[STORY CONTEXT]
Pineapple Baby is sitting attentively with happy emotion in a classroom scene (mood: joyful). Scene also includes: Ube Baby (center), tiki (right).
Setting: Classroom — indoor school classroom setting. Mood: joyful.
Full cast of 3: Pineapple Baby at left; Ube Baby at center; tiki at right.

[ASSEMBLY INTENT]
Pineapple Baby will be placed at the left position, facing right, at large scale. This is an isolated layer for later compositing into the full scene.

[CHARACTER PERFORMANCE]
Emotion: happy. Action: sitting attentively. Pose: seated pose.
Facing: facing right.

[OFFICIAL FIDELITY]
Official feature locks — match exactly:
  - body: warm golden-yellow pineapple oval
  - texture: pineapple diamond/crosshatch pattern
  - top: layered multi-leaf green spiky pineapple crown
  - arms: two short rounded baby arms
Must show:
  - warm golden-yellow plump pineapple oval body
  - pineapple diamond/crosshatch texture on body
  - layered green spiky pineapple crown leaves on top
  - two short rounded baby arms
Must avoid:
  - green body color — crown leaves are green, body is golden-yellow
  - purple or lavender body — that belongs to Ube Baby
  - mango orange/green gradient body — that belongs to Mango Baby
  - heart-shaped leaf cluster — that belongs to Ube Baby
Character must be immediately recognizable as official Pineapple Baby. Cute baby-like proportions.

[CLEAN LAYER OUTPUT]
White or transparent background — no environment. Full character body visible with padding.
No other characters, no other Fruit Baby characters. Pineapple Baby only.

[CHARACTER LAYER — UBE BABY]
Generate an isolated character layer of Ube Baby only. This is an admin-only production asset for staged compositing.
Do NOT include any other Fruit Baby characters in this layer.

[STORY CONTEXT]
Ube Baby is sitting attentively with happy emotion in a classroom scene (mood: joyful). Scene also includes: Pineapple Baby (left), tiki (right).
Setting: Classroom — indoor school classroom setting. Mood: joyful.
Full cast of 3: Pineapple Baby at left; Ube Baby at center; tiki at right.

[ASSEMBLY INTENT]
Ube Baby will be placed at the center position, facing the viewer, at medium scale. This is an isolated layer for later compositing into the full scene.

[CHARACTER PERFORMANCE]
Emotion: happy. Action: sitting attentively. Pose: seated pose.
Facing: facing the viewer.

[OFFICIAL FIDELITY]
Official feature locks — match exactly:
  - body: soft purple/lavender smooth oval
  - texture: smooth, no crosshatch
  - top: green heart-shaped leaf cluster
  - arms: two short rounded baby arms
Must show:
  - soft purple/lavender smooth round body — no pineapple texture
  - green heart-shaped leaf cluster on top
  - two short rounded baby arms
  - baby-like proportions with cute round face
Must avoid:
  - pineapple diamond/crosshatch body texture — body must be smooth purple
  - golden-yellow or orange body — that belongs to Pineapple Baby
  - mango orange/green gradient — that belongs to Mango Baby
  - layered spiky pineapple crown — that belongs to Pineapple Baby
Character must be immediately recognizable as official Ube Baby. Cute baby-like proportions.

[CLEAN LAYER OUTPUT]
White or transparent background — no environment. Full character body visible with padding.
No other characters, no other Fruit Baby characters. Ube Baby only.

[CHARACTER LAYER — TIKI]
Generate an isolated character layer of tiki only. This is an admin-only production asset for staged compositing.
Do NOT include any other Fruit Baby characters in this layer.

[STORY CONTEXT]
tiki is sitting attentively with happy emotion in a classroom scene (mood: joyful). Scene also includes: Pineapple Baby (left), Ube Baby (center).
Setting: Classroom — indoor school classroom setting. Mood: joyful.
Full cast of 3: Pineapple Baby at left; Ube Baby at center; tiki at right.

[ASSEMBLY INTENT]
tiki will be placed at the right position, facing left, at medium scale. This is an isolated layer for later compositing into the full scene.

[CHARACTER PERFORMANCE]
Emotion: happy. Action: sitting attentively. Pose: seated pose.
Facing: facing left.

[OFFICIAL FIDELITY]
Official feature locks — match exactly:
  - baby-like plump proportions
  - fruit-specific body color and shape
  - character-specific top feature
Must show:
  - cute baby-like proportions — plump, short, round
  - signature fruit body shape and color
  - signature top feature (leaf, crown, or stem)
  - two short rounded baby arms
Must avoid:
  - realistic or adult proportions
  - borrowing features from other Fruit Baby characters
  - redesigning or reinterpreting the official character design
Character must be immediately recognizable as official tiki. Cute baby-like proportions.

[CLEAN LAYER OUTPUT]
White or transparent background — no environment. Full character body visible with padding.
No other characters, no other Fruit Baby characters. tiki only.

scenes.title: A Surprising Return
scenes.summary: Tiki grumpily gives back the star fruit, muttering that he didn't even want it anyway. Ube Baby thanks him gently. Tiki stomps off but secretly glances back with a tiny smile.
scenes.visualNotes: Warm sunset colors. Tiki's retreat is dramatic but hints at a softer side. Ube Baby and Pineapple Baby share a cozy hug.

backgroundLayers.promptText:
=== A. PANEL TASK ===
Create a single still storybook illustration panel for Scene 4 — "A Surprising Return".
Style: children's picture book, colorful, warm, soft, and rounded.
Capture a single clear, readable story moment for young children.

=== B. SCENE CONTENT ===
Scene: Tiki grumpily gives back the star fruit, muttering that he didn't even want it anyway. Ube Baby thanks him gently. Tiki stomps off but secretly glances back with a tiny smile.
Setting: Starlight Garden and the edge of Trouble Island
Visual notes: Warm sunset colors. Tiki's retreat is dramatic but hints at a softer side. Ube Baby and Pineapple Baby share a cozy hug.

=== C. CHARACTERS IN SCENE ===
Pineapple Baby:
  Description: Pineapple Baby is the warm, brave heart of the Fruit Baby Universe! Always ready to help a friend, share a smile, or jump into a new adventure — Pineapple Baby leads with kindness and lights up every room.
  Personality: Kind, Curious, Nurturing, Brave
  Story role: Main character. Pineapple Baby drives the adventure, solves problems through kindness, and brings the group together.
  Visual identity: Bright sunshine yellow body with a bold green leafy crown. Warm brown eyes, pink blush cheeks, and a diamond pattern on the front. Soft, rounded, and cheerful.
  Color palette: Sunshine Yellow (#FFD84D), Golden Orange (#FFB347), Leaf Green (#7AC943), Warm Brown (#5C3A1E), Blush Pink (#FFB8C8)
  Always: Lead with kindness; Support and encourage friends; Stay optimistic even when things go wrong
  Never: Be mean or dismissive to friends; Give up on someone who needs help; Act selfishly

Ube Baby:
  Description: Ube Baby is the dreamy, gentle sparkle of Fruit Baby Universe! Soft, imaginative, and full of cozy magic, Ube Baby loves making friends feel safe, loved, and inspired. Though a little shy at first, Ube Baby shines through kindness, wonder, and sweet little wishes.
  Personality: Sweet — kind-hearted and caring, Imaginative — sees magic in little things, Gentle — calm, com

panels.prompt:
=== A. PANEL TASK ===
Create a single still storybook illustration panel for Scene 3 — "Tiki's Big Mistake".
Style: children's picture book, colorful, warm, soft, and rounded.
Capture a single clear, readable story moment for young children.

=== B. SCENE CONTENT ===
Scene: Tiki Trouble is discovered trying to use the star fruit as a fancy new hat decoration. He insists it belongs to him now. But when Pineapple Baby explains how much it means to Ube Baby, Tiki pauses — and feels a tiny pang of guilt.
Setting: Starlight Garden and the edge of Trouble Island
Visual notes: Dramatic Trouble Island scene. Tiki is caught in the act. Exaggerated expressions throughout.

=== C. CHARACTERS IN SCENE ===
Pineapple Baby:
  Description: Pineapple Baby is the warm, brave heart of the Fruit Baby Universe! Always ready to help a friend, share a smile, or jump into a new adventure — Pineapple Baby leads with kindness and lights up every room.
  Personality: Kind, Curious, Nurturing, Brave
  Story role: Main character. Pineapple Baby drives the adventure, solves problems through kindness, and brings the group together.

  Color palette: Sunshine Yellow (#FFD84D), Golden Orange (#FFB347), Leaf Green (#7AC943), Warm Brown (#5C3A1E), Blush Pink (#FFB8C8)
  Always: Lead with kindness; Support and encourage friends; Stay optimistic even when things go wrong
  Never: Be mean or dismissive to friends; Give up on someone who needs help; Act selfishly

Ube Baby:
  Description: Ube Baby is the dreamy, gentle sparkle of Fruit Baby Universe! Soft, imaginative, and full of cozy magic, Ube Baby loves making friends feel safe, loved, and inspired. Though a little shy at first, Ube Baby shines through kindness, wonder, and sweet little wishes.
  Personality: Sweet — kind-hearted and caring, Imaginative — sees magic in little things, Gentle — calm, comforting, and soft-spoken, Shy — quiet at first, but warm with friends
  Story role: The emotional heart of the group. Ube Baby brings creativity, empathy, and calm to difficult moments. Often the one who finds a gentle solution.
  Visual identity: Round, soft purple body with a bright green leafy top. Big sparkly eyes, pink blush cheeks, and a gentle dreamy expression. Radiates cozy, magical warmth.
  Color palette: Bright Purple (#8E44AD), Deep Purple (#6A2E99), Blush Pink (#FFB8C8), Leaf Green (#7BC943), Dark Green (#4A8C3C)
  Home / environment: Starlight Garden
  Always: Speak softly and with kindness; Notice how others are feeling; Find creative or imaginative solutions
  Never: Be loud or aggressive; Dismiss someone's feelings; Act without thinking of others

Tiki Trouble:
  Description: Tiki Trouble is the sneaky, dramatic, self-proclaimed ruler of Trouble Island! He loves causing chaos, plotting schemes, and bossing his minions around — but deep down, he secretly admires Pineapple Baby's kindness more than he'd ever admit.
  Personality: Cheeky — always has a sly grin and a plan, Sneaky — loves spying, hiding, and plotting, Boastful — thinks he's the most important character in every story, Dramatic — turns every small setback into a huge scene
  Story role: The antagonist. Tiki creates the problem or obstacle in each story — a stolen item, a blocked path, a silly prank gone wrong. He rarely wins, and each episode teaches a lesson about emotions, fairness, or kindness.
  Visual identity: Carved wooden tiki mask face with angry brows and a wide grin full of teeth. Green leaf crown with tiny flames. Orange/red tribal-style headband. Skull necklace. Carries a small spear. Fiery and dramatic but still cute and kid-friendly. Treasure chest and Trouble Island setting.
  Color palette: Carved Wood Brown (#8B5A2B), Deep Wood Brown (#5C3A1E), Fire Orange (#FF6B00), Leaf Green (#7AC943), Torch Yellow (#FFD84D)
  Home / environment: Trouble Island
  Always: Be dramatic and over-the-top about everything; Plot and scheme but always fail in a funny way; Stay kid-friendly — mischievous, never truly scary
  Never: Cause real harm or be genuinely threatening; Scare younger audiences; Win in a way that feels unfair or mean-spirited
